summary: Vendor Performance Pack (Phase 2) testing complete. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend vendor self-view page fully functional. Admin vendor list shows Performance column but cells show '—' for TEST_ vendors (expected - no matching partner accounts).

integration_issues.issue: Performance cells show '—' for all vendors because TEST_ vendors in users collection don't have matching partner_users accounts. This is expected data architecture behavior - vendor performance is computed from partner_users/vendor_orders, not users collection.

test_credentials: Admin: admin@konekt.co.tz / KnktcKk_L-hw1wSyquvd!, Vendor: demo.partner@konekt.com / Partner123!, Customer: demo.customer@konekt.com / Demo123!
seed_data_creation: None - used existing partner_users and vendor_orders data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vendor Performance Pack Phase 2 complete. Two partners exist: 69b808ba438432759934f2be (Demo Partner, 0 orders, 58% developing) and 69b827eae21f56c57362c6b7 (John Demo/demo.partner@konekt.com, 9 orders, 57% risk). The admin vendor list uses users collection (UUID IDs) while performance uses partner_users (ObjectId). Performance cells only show for vendors with matching email in perfMap.

1_admin_vendor_team_performance.details: Returns list of 2 vendors with vendor_id, name, email, company, status, performance_score, performance_zone, sample_size. Admin only (403 for non-admin).

2_admin_vendor_detail_performance.details: Returns full breakdown with 5 metrics, tips array, computed_at, last_updated. Breakdown entries include 'tip' field for admin.

3_vendor_my_performance_role_safe.details: Returns own performance. ROLE-SAFE: Breakdown entries do NOT have 'tip' field. Tips array still present at top level.

5_customer_blocked_vendor_endpoint.details: Customer gets 401 'Invalid token' (customer token is not partner token)

6_admin_vendor_list_performance_column.details: Performance column header present in table. Cells show '—' for TEST_ vendors (no matching partner accounts).

7_vendor_my_performance_page.details: Page loads with score card (57% RISK), 5 breakdown bars, improvement tips, last updated date.

8_vendor_sidebar_my_performance_link.details: My Performance link present under VENDOR section in sidebar navigation.

9_performance_breakdown_drawer.details: Drawer component exists and is wired up. Could not test click because no performance cells rendered (TEST_ vendors have no partner accounts).

10_unauthenticated_access_blocked.details: Both admin and vendor endpoints return 401/403 for unauthenticated requests.

performance_data_note: Vendor 69b827eae21f56c57362c6b7 (demo.partner@konekt.com) has 9 vendor_orders and shows 57% score in 'risk' zone. Breakdown: Timeliness 75%, Quality 11%, Responsiveness 89%, Internal Rating 75%, Process Compliance 22%.
